label: Lantern Keeper's Cell
description: Lantern Keeper's Cell forms a narrow lodging chamber cut into the former inspection hall’s service spine, its walls plated in void-black adamantine and cross-bolted against vibration. A recessed cot and fold-down ferrocrete desk are built flush to the structure, leaving the floor clear for storage lockers stamped with ration tallies and quarantine seals. Lumen-shielded strips throw disciplined bars of light across impact-scored plating, while a brass-grilled vent and small scrubber intake keep the air dry and medicinal. A slit-window set high in the wall admits a cold bruise-hued wash from Cyrenth Vale’s aurorae, muted by internal shutters.
